title: SpecCitation
description: Stable reference format for citing specific locations in specification or guideline documents

sec_id.description: Section identifier within the document (e.g., '4.1.2', heading slug)

stable_id.description: Concatenation of doc and section as unique identifier (e.g., 'SPEC-API-v2#3.2')

text.description: The exact text or concise summary of the cited section/clause
